A Note from Campus Ready
Confidence. Dignity. A Strong Start.

Tonight is for you. You applied, you were selected, and you showed up. That matters.

Campus Ready Foundation exists because we believe every student deserves to walk onto campus feeling ready. Tonight we'll walk through your grant, answer your questions, and send you off with what you need to start strong.

We're glad you're here. Enjoy the evening.

Eric Lilavois & Karen Dantzler
Co-Founders, Campus Ready Foundation
